parameter.name: otlpURL
parameter.label: OTLP Endpoint URL
parameter.description: OTLP endpoint to push telemetry to. Set to a local OTel Collector (e.g. http://localhost:4318) or directly to a backend ingest URL. Using a collector keeps backend credentials out of openHAB and allows routing to multiple backends.

parameter.name: otlpHeaders
parameter.label: OTLP Headers
parameter.description: Comma-separated authentication headers, e.g. Authorization=Bearer token. Only required for direct-to-backend deployments. Leave empty when using a collector.

parameter.name: logsEnabled
parameter.label: Export Logs
parameter.description: Enable exporting openHAB logs to OpenTelemetry.

parameter.name: logsEndpoint
parameter.label: Log Endpoint
parameter.description: The endpoint to send logs to.

parameter.name: metricsEnabled
parameter.label: Export Metrics
parameter.description: Enable exporting openHAB metrics to OpenTelemetry.

parameter.name: metricsEndpoint
parameter.label: Metrics Endpoint
parameter.description: The endpoint to send metrics to.

parameter.name: metricsInterval
parameter.label: Metrics Export Interval
parameter.description: How often metrics are pushed (ISO 8601 duration, e.g. PT60S for 60 seconds).

parameter.name: metricsAggregationTemporality
parameter.label: Aggregation Temporality
parameter.description:
CUMULATIVE: running totals since process start; works with most backends and OTel Collector pipelines.
DELTA: change since last report; required by some backends when receiving OTLP directly. Consult your backend's documentation.

parameter.name: tracesEnabled
parameter.label: Export Traces
parameter.description: Enable exporting openHAB event-bus spans to OpenTelemetry. These are flat, single-span traces (item/thing/rule events), not distributed call trees — openHAB's event bus has no request context to attach a parent to. For real distributed HTTP traces, run the OTel Java agent alongside this bundle (see README).

parameter.name: tracesEndpoint
parameter.label: Traces Endpoint
parameter.description: The endpoint to send traces to.

parameter.name: tracesSamplingRatio
parameter.label: Traces Sampling Ratio
parameter.description: Fraction of event-bus spans to export (0.0 = none, 1.0 = all). Lower values reduce volume on busy instances.
